title: sempervivum × verlotii var. parvulum
intro: Sempervivum × verlotii var. parvulum, also known as Parvulus, is a succulent plant that belongs to the Sempervivum genus and is a hybrid of Sempervivum tectorum. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are said to be effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, due to its rich content of saponins and other bioactive compounds. Sempervivum × verlotii var. parvulum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be applied topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
